scripts.clean: clear && pnpx npkill -D -y && rm -rf pnpm-lock.yaml node_modules .examples && pnpm install
scripts.prerelease: pnpm run test:all && pnpm run jsr:sync-version
scripts.bump:patch: tsx scripts/bump-version.ts patch && pnpm run jsr:sync-version && tsx scripts/stamp-changelogs.ts
scripts.bump:minor: tsx scripts/bump-version.ts minor && pnpm run jsr:sync-version && tsx scripts/stamp-changelogs.ts
scripts.bump:major: tsx scripts/bump-version.ts major && pnpm run jsr:sync-version && tsx scripts/stamp-changelogs.ts
scripts.bump:alpha: tsx scripts/bump-version.ts prerelease alpha && pnpm run jsr:sync-version
scripts.bump:beta: tsx scripts/bump-version.ts prerelease beta && pnpm run jsr:sync-version
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run check:portability && pnpm --filter '*' run typecheck
